description: Refresh of Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct cells at b=256 + b=512 on niah_multikey_1_4k validation[:50] using the canonical bf16-fixed harness (vorn-mat main b0223af). Replaces the 2026-05-14 pre-fix artifact (qwen-4k-budget-sweep-2026-05-14.json) which contained the !-cascade harness artifact (fp16 NaN logits → token-0 emission). Companion to Sub-lane B b=1024 row refresh (2026-05-26). The !-cascade differentially suppressed attention-weight methods more than vorn methods on Qwen 2.5; post-fix data reveals Qwen 2.5 is channel-tolerant rather than vorn-favoring.

run_conditions.harness_substrate_fix_ref: vorn-mat-2026-05-23 bf16-stability (Gemma 3 NaN-cascade fix); applied cross-family on 2026-05-26 after Qwen 2.5 !-cascade was identified via prediction-text audit
